scripts.build: npm run build -w @epis2/contracts && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-domain && npm run build -w @epis2/design-system && npm run build -w @epis2/command-registry && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-forms && npm run build -w @epis2/epis2-widgets && npm run build -w @epis2/epis2-ui && npm run build -w @epis2/test-fixtures && npm run build -w @epis2/fhir-export && npm run build -w @epis2/local-ai && npm run build -w @epis2/api && npm run build -w @epis2/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @epis2/contracts && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-domain && npm run build -w @epis2/design-system && npm run build -w @epis2/command-registry && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-forms && npm run build -w @epis2/epis2-widgets && npm run build -w @epis2/epis2-ui && npm run build -w @epis2/test-fixtures && npm run build -w @epis2/fhir-export && npm run build -w @epis2/local-ai && npm run typecheck -w @epis2/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @epis2/clinical-domain && npm run typecheck -w @epis2/design-system && npm run typecheck -w @epis2/command-registry && npm run typecheck -w @epis2/clinical-forms && npm run typecheck -w @epis2/epis2-widgets && npm run typecheck -w @epis2/epis2-ui && npm run typecheck -w @epis2/test-fixtures && npm run typecheck -w @epis2/fhir-export && npm run typecheck -w @epis2/local-ai && npm run typecheck -w @epis2/api && npm run typecheck -w @epis2/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @epis2/contracts && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-domain && npm run build -w @epis2/design-system && npm run build -w @epis2/command-registry && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-forms && npm run build -w @epis2/epis2-widgets && npm run build -w @epis2/epis2-ui && npm run build -w @epis2/test-fixtures && npm run build -w @epis2/fhir-export && vitest run
scripts.quality:golden-journey: npm run build -w @epis2/command-registry && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-forms && npm run build -w @epis2/test-fixtures && vitest run tests/golden-clinical-journey.spec.ts tests/golden-clinical-journey.api.spec.ts
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run architecture:validate
